simple_types.name: RCMR_CKG_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCMR_CKG_Field is
   CONTINUOUS,
   EN_RF_LOW,
   EN_RF_HIGH)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUOUS
enumeration_literals.description: Receive Clock enabled only if RF Low

enumeration_literals.name: EN_RF_LOW
enumeration_literals.description: Receive Clock enabled only if RF High

simple_types.name: RCMR_CKO_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCMR_CKO_Field is
   NONE,
   CONTINUOUS,
   TRANSFER)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: NONE
enumeration_literals.description: Continuous Receive Clock, RK pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUOUS
enumeration_literals.description: Receive Clock only during data transfers, RK pin is an output

simple_types.name: RCMR_CKS_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCMR_CKS_Field is
   MCK,
   TK,
   RK)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MCK
enumeration_literals.description: TK Clock signal

enumeration_literals.name: TK
enumeration_literals.description: RK pin

simple_types.name: RCMR_START_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCMR_START_Field is
   CONTINUOUS,
   TRANSMIT,
   RF_LOW,
   RF_HIGH,
   RF_FALLING,
   RF_RISING,
   RF_LEVEL,
   RF_EDGE,
   CMP_0)
  with Size => 4;

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUOUS
enumeration_literals.description: Transmit start

enumeration_literals.name: TRANSMIT
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a low level on RF signal

enumeration_literals.name: RF_LOW
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a high level on RF signal

enumeration_literals.name: RF_HIGH
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a falling edge on RF signal

enumeration_literals.name: RF_FALLING
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a rising edge on RF signal

enumeration_literals.name: RF_RISING
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of any level change on RF signal

enumeration_literals.name: RF_LEVEL
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of any edge on RF signal

enumeration_literals.name: RF_EDGE
enumeration_literals.description: Compare 0

simple_types.name: RFMR_FSEDGE_Field
simple_types.code:
type RFMR_FSEDGE_Field is
   POSITIVE,
   NEGATIVE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: POSITIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Negative Edge Detection

simple_types.name: RFMR_FSOS_Field
simple_types.code:
type RFMR_FSOS_Field is
   NONE,
   NEGATIVE,
   POSITIVE,
   LOW,
   HIGH,
   TOGGLING)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: NONE
enumeration_literals.description: Negative Pulse, RF pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: NEGATIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Positive Pulse, RF pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: POSITIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Driven Low during data transfer, RF pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: LOW
enumeration_literals.description: Driven High during data transfer, RF pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH
enumeration_literals.description: Toggling at each start of data transfer, RF pin is an output

simple_types.name: TCMR_CKG_Field
simple_types.code:
type TCMR_CKG_Field is
   CONTINUOUS,
   EN_TF_LOW,
   EN_TF_HIGH)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUOUS
enumeration_literals.description: Transmit Clock enabled only if TF Low

enumeration_literals.name: EN_TF_LOW
enumeration_literals.description: Transmit Clock enabled only if TF High

simple_types.name: TCMR_CKO_Field
simple_types.code:
type TCMR_CKO_Field is
   NONE,
   CONTINUOUS,
   TRANSFER)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: NONE
enumeration_literals.description: Continuous Transmit Clock, TK pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUOUS
enumeration_literals.description: Transmit Clock only during data transfers, TK pin is an output

simple_types.name: TCMR_CKS_Field
simple_types.code:
type TCMR_CKS_Field is
   MCK,
   RK,
   TK)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MCK
enumeration_literals.description: RK Clock signal

enumeration_literals.name: RK
enumeration_literals.description: TK pin

simple_types.name: TCMR_START_Field
simple_types.code:
type TCMR_START_Field is
   CONTINUOUS,
   RECEIVE,
   TF_LOW,
   TF_HIGH,
   TF_FALLING,
   TF_RISING,
   TF_LEVEL,
   TF_EDGE)
  with Size => 4;

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUOUS
enumeration_literals.description: Receive start

enumeration_literals.name: RECEIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a low level on TF signal

enumeration_literals.name: TF_LOW
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a high level on TF signal

enumeration_literals.name: TF_HIGH
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a falling edge on TF signal

enumeration_literals.name: TF_FALLING
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of a rising edge on TF signal

enumeration_literals.name: TF_RISING
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of any level change on TF signal

enumeration_literals.name: TF_LEVEL
enumeration_literals.description: Detection of any edge on TF signal

simple_types.name: TFMR_FSEDGE_Field
simple_types.code:
type TFMR_FSEDGE_Field is
   POSITIVE,
   NEGATIVE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: POSITIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Negative Edge Detection

simple_types.name: TFMR_FSOS_Field
simple_types.code:
type TFMR_FSOS_Field is
   NONE,
   NEGATIVE,
   POSITIVE,
   LOW,
   HIGH,
   TOGGLING)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: NONE
enumeration_literals.description: Negative Pulse, RF pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: NEGATIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Positive Pulse, RF pin is an output

enumeration_literals.name: POSITIVE
enumeration_literals.description: Driven Low during data transfer

enumeration_literals.name: LOW
enumeration_literals.description: Driven High during data transfer

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH
enumeration_literals.description: Toggling at each start of data transfer

simple_types.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit.Always reads as 0.
